localizations.title: Ralph Azham: The Axolotl's Liver
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Look closely at the center of Ralph's medallion.
localizations.code_3284: Gathering their courage, Ralph and Yassou dive into the depths of the river. Take card 42 from the deck.
localizations.code_4395: Gathering their courage, Ralph and Yassou dive into the depths of the river. Take card 42 from the deck.
localizations.code_3274: You're not far off, but one fish is missing (you must have "skipped" one).
localizations.code_4385: You're not far off, but one fish is missing (you must have "skipped" one).
localizations.code_3518: After a short walk, Ralph Azham and Yassou return to the magicians' village. Phew! Just in time to give the giant axolotl's liver to the healers. They quickly concoct a remedy which, although accompanied by some undesirable side effects, saves the patriarch! The remains of the amphibian are cooked. Ralph and Yassou eat, trying to forget the animal's gentle gaze. The grateful magicians thank them profusely before asking them to leave quickly. Tomorrow, the adventure will continue for them.
localizations.hint_7_first: Ralph Azham has a super power. To trigger it, press the "Machine" button (gear) in the app and enter the card number: 7. You can then scan different cards to trigger (or not) his devastating power. Oh, and one more thing: look closely at this card.
localizations.hint_7: Only assassins can be targeted by Ralph's power. You should only encounter two in this adventure: scan their card and watch them be torn apart with delight. Also, did you find the hidden number on this card?
localizations.hint_19: This necklace should allow you to turn Yassou's prison into dust.
localizations.hint_27_first: This card requires a code to be entered into the app. You'll have to play (with) the fish and put them in the right order.
localizations.hint_27: What if you counted the fish of the same color? The village fisherman who dries his catch on a line will help you put them in the right order: that's the code.
localizations.hint_32_first: This man will clearly be of no help to you, but his colored fish seem to be hanging in an order that could help you.
localizations.hint_32: The order in which the colored fish are hung allows you to solve a code that will be very useful when you want to dive into a lake.
localizations.hint_35_first: This axe really has a very solid handle. More solid than its iron, at first glance.
localizations.hint_35: It should allow you to lift very heavy weights... like stones, for example.
localizations.hint_36: You have nothing else to do here but take card 41.
localizations.hint_38_first: This card requires a code to be entered into the app. To find it, look closely at the names written on the steles. Don't they remind you of number sequences?
localizations.hint_38: Yassou tells you that Tanghor will show the way. Which symbol corresponds to Tanghor? The solution is in your hands! Once found, enter the 4 digits from the correct tombstone into the app.
localizations.hint_41_first: This cage should be able to turn into dust thanks to an object in Ralph Azham's possession... Look closely at his card.
localizations.hint_41: Ralph Azham's necklace turns stone into dust. Find it (it's a hidden number on Ralph's card that will allow you to get it) and use it on the cage.
localizations.hint_42_first: How to clear the stones? This red card needs a blue element... Do you have many at your disposal?
localizations.hint_42: You should find a tool - or a weapon - to act as a lever and push these stones.
localizations.hint_46: Nothing to report here: simply take cards 32 and 80 from the deck.
localizations.hint_59: Nothing to report here: simply take cards 7 and 46 from the deck.
localizations.hint_60_first: Free Yassou (by taking card 64): he should help you quickly stop the very angry fisherman rushing at you!
localizations.hint_60: One of Yassou's spells could be very useful for stopping this man without causing more damage in the village.
localizations.hint_64_first: Use each of Yassou's spells wisely. You shouldn't have too much trouble knowing when to call on him.
localizations.hint_64: Figus Figitus can stop an attacker dead. Cataclysmic Explosion can produce a... cataclysmic explosion. Be careful, the latter is really very (too) powerful.
localizations.hint_74: Nothing to report here: simply take cards 27 and 35 from the deck.
localizations.hint_77_first: This card contains a hidden number.
localizations.hint_77: Look closely in the water, at the waves.
localizations.hint_80_first: These men aren't joking, they really have the heads of assassins and must have made many victims.
localizations.hint_80: Ralph Azham's power should be particularly appropriate for defeating these murderers.
localizations.hint_88: Nothing to report here: simply take card 38 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_7: Scan card 80 with your smartphone or tablet. The spirits of the victims of the two assassins will kill them and the app will tell you what to do to move forward. And look at Ralph's necklace to take card 19 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_19: Use this necklace on the cage in which Yassou is locked (41): 19+41=60. Take card 60 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_27: The correct order of the fish is yellow, red, green and blue (it's indicated on the fisherman's card (32)). After counting the fish (don't forget the green fish hidden in the tree) and putting them in the right order, you get the code 3284. Enter it into the app ("Code" icon).
localizations.answer_hint_32: The important element here is the fish order: yellow, red, green and blue. Associate each color with a digit when you have to solve a yellow card to get the right code.
localizations.answer_hint_35: Use the axe as a lever to clear the stones blocking the cave entrance (card 42): 35+42=77. Take card 77 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_38: Look at the back of the cards. Tanghor appears there, associated with a symbol. Now look at the tombstones and find the one with the same symbol. The associated word is BISE. Once turned upside down, it gives you the code 3518. Enter it into the app ("Code" icon).
localizations.answer_hint_41: Use Ralph's necklace (19) on the stone of the cage. 41+19=60. Take card 60 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Use the axe (35) on these stones. 35+42=77. Take card 77 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_60: Use Yassou's "Figus Figitus" spell (+14) with this card: 60+14=74. Take card 74 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_64: Figus Figitus (+14) will help you stop the man armed with an axe (60) rushing at you: 14+60=74. Take card 74 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_77: An 88 is hidden in the water. Take card 88 from the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_80: Press the "Machine" button (gear) in the app and enter 7 (Ralph Azham). Then scan this card and watch the show. The app will tell you what to do.
localizations.machine_7: The ghosts throw themselves at their assassins and attack them. Take card 36 from the deck.
